ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - Flight 1234
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are pleased to confirm your upcoming flight with Air Bharat.

Flight Details:
• Flight No.: AB1234
• Departure: Mumbai (BOM) – 10:15 AM, 15th August 2026
• Arrival: New Delhi (DEL) – 12:45 PM, 15th August 2026
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Class: Business

Check‑in:
• Online check‑in opens 24 hours before departure. Please visit <URL> to complete the process.
• Baggage allowance: 2 pieces up to 23 kg each.

Gate Information:
• Gate will be announced 30 minutes before boarding.

If you have any special requirements or need assistance, kindly contact our customer care at +91-9876543210 or email support@airbharat.com.

Thank you for choosing Air Bharat. We wish you a pleasant journey.

Best regards,

Air Bharat Customer Service

spam.subject: Important: Income Tax Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

Greetings from the Income Tax Department, New Delhi.

We are writing to inform you that a refund of INR 45,000 has been credited to your specified bank account (Account No. 1234567890, IFSC: HDFC0000123). To ensure the security of your funds, you are requested to verify the transaction details by following the instructions below.

1. Click on the secure link provided in the email to confirm your refund: <URL>
2. Enter your PAN, AADHAR number, and the last four digits of your bank account.
3. Submit the form within 48 hours to avoid cancellation of the refund.

Please note that failure to verify the refund within the stipulated time may result in the reversal of the credited amount. This is a compulsory step as per the latest Income Tax Rules.

For any queries, contact the Income Tax Helpline at +91-1800-123-456 or email ithelpline@itr.gov.in.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

Asha Gupta
Senior Officer
Income Tax Department
New Delhi
